channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Utah's push to wrest control of public land from the federal government
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court on Monday turned back a push by the state of Utah to wrest control of vast areas of public land from the federal government, marking a small victory for land conservation advocates who worry that similar efforts may escalate in a Republican-controlled Washington.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST and HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senate advances Laken Riley bill past second hurdle
item.description: The Laken Riley Act on Monday cleared a second procedural hurdle in the Senate as talk turns to an amendment push by Democrats in order to potentially make alterations to the bill. Senators voted 82-10 on the motion to proceed to the legislation, allowing the chamber to begin debate.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Former Dem fundraiser sees 'overwhelmingly positive' response as her longtime donors give to Trump inaugural
item.description: Former Democrat fundraiser Lindy Li, named to President-elect Trump’s inaugural fundraising committee, says many of her longtime donors have given enthusiastically.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Federal judge clears way for release of special counsel report on Trump election case
item.description: Special Counsel Jack Smith's report on his investigation into President-elect Trump for election interference is cleared to be released to the public.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Key Republican says he will support Gabbard as Trump DNI pick
item.description: Sen. James Lankford, R-Okla., said in a Sunday interview that he will support President-elect Donald Trump’s pick for director of national intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's inauguration weekend features fireworks, MAGA rally, inaugural balls
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump's inauguration weekend will start with a fireworks display outside his northern Virginia golf club and end with a trio of inaugural balls where he will speak, the committee planning the events announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: DeSantis's call for special session 'premature,' Senate President, House Speaker say
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis announced a special legislative session to address illegal immigration, among other issues, on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Hegseth could lead troops who'd face getting fired for actions he's done in the past
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — If Pete Hegseth were still in uniform, his extramarital affairs and a decision to flatly ignore a combat commander's directive would not just be drawing the attention of senators — they could have run afoul of military law.
item.dc:creator: TARA COPP and LOLITA C. BALDOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Arizona's Democratic governor faces uphill battle as Republicans keep tight grip on legislature
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Arizona Democratic Gov. Katie Hobbs knows she is outnumbered this legislative session, with Republicans having expanded their majorities in the statehouse after the last election.
item.dc:creator: SEJAL GOVINDARAO and GABRIEL SANDOVAL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Steve Bannon says he will ‘take down’ the ‘truly evil’ Elon Musk
item.description: “I will have Elon Musk run out of here by Inauguration Day,” Bannon said, adding “He is a truly evil guy, a very bad guy. I made it my personal thing to take this guy down.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Rahm Emanuel steps down as Japan ambassador ahead of Trump inauguration
item.description: “Last year, I spoke at the U.S. Naval War College and found it both rewarding and reaffirming,” Emanuel said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, NewsNation

item.title: TikTok app a ‘national security risk,' Sen. Mark Kelly says
item.description: “I imagine [there's gonna] be a disruption in the service here, you know, starting on the 19th,” Kelly told CBS News’s Margaret Brennan on “Face the Nation.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Republicans urge Trump nominees: Don't take the bait from Democrats
item.description: Senate Republicans are urging President-elect Trump’s Cabinet nominees to resist taking the bait from Democrats when their high-stakes confirmation hearings kick off next week, marking a make-or-break moment for some of his choices.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: What happens on Inauguration Day? A schedule of key events
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump's inauguration coincides with Martin Luther King Jr. Day — a rare occurrence.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: California's working class overlooked amid wildfires, US rep says
item.description: Rep. Maxine Waters, D-Calif., called for attention to the working class people in Altadena, California, who have “limited resources" amid the wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Appeals court dismisses ousted Hillsborough State Attorney's lawsuit against DeSantis
item.description: A federal appeals court dismissed a lawsuit brought against Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis by Andrew Warren, a former state attorney he suspended from his position.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Friends, family, presidents pay tribute to Jimmy Carter at funeral
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As they filed into the front pews at Washington National Cathedral, wearing dark suits and mostly solemn faces, five current and former presidents came together for Jimmy Carter's funeral.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pinellas residents struggle with permit delays, seek accountability
item.description: Many Pinellas County residents have been displaced from their homes since Hurricane Helene hit more than 100 days ago. Some have nowhere else to go, forcing them to stay in damaged and unfinished homes until the county gives them the permits to rebuild.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: LA Mayor Bass stonewalls reporter for 90 seconds at airport
item.description: Video taken on an airport jetway shows Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass repeatedly ignoring questions from a reporter about her response to the wildfires ripping through the area this week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Nevada Democrats join Republicans in bill to detain migrants accused of certain crimes
item.description: All five members of Southern Nevada’s congressional delegation said they support a Republican proposal to detain immigrants in the country illegally who commit certain crimes.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ex-FBI informant who fabricated bribery story about Biden and his son Hunter gets 6 years in prison
item.description: A former FBI informant who fabricated a story about President Joe Biden and his son Hunter accepting bribes that became central to Republicans’ impeachment effort was sentenced Wednesday to six years in prison.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: New book alleges that someone at Fox News gave Trump's team early look at town hall questions
item.description: Someone inside Fox News gave Donald Trump's presidential campaign the questions he would face ahead of a town hall the network produced in January 2024, a forthcoming book alleges, according to excerpts reported by CNN.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan J. Cooper, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Justice Department says it plans to release only part of special counsel's Trump report for now
item.description: The Justice Department said Wednesday that it will release special counsel Jack Smith’s findings on Donald Trump’s efforts to undo the results of the 2020 presidential election but will keep under wraps for now the rest of the record focused on the president-elect's hoarding of classified documents
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: California governor proposes $322B budget with no deficit after two years of shortfalls
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom has proposed a $322 billion budget without a deficit, a welcome change after two years of significant budget shortfalls in the nation's most populous state.
item.dc:creator: Tran Nguyen, Associated Press, Fox 5
